stock.label: Mission State Stock Image
stock.notes: Current approved stock image for the mission tab state.

candidates.label: Mission Square / Mission
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "homepage mission tab square image",
  "business_context": "Rally Technology, a Taiwanese industrial automation and control integration company",
  "page_role": "Homepage Mission square image for the mission state",
  "goal": "Create a photorealistic square image that reinforces steady engineering execution, system discipline, and credible industrial work",
  "visual_message": "A focused engineer or technician interaction with equipment that feels capable, calm, and operational",
  "recipe_ids": [
    "operator-as-scale-only",
    "technical-signal-stack",
    "named-visual-standard",
    "color-material-control"
  ],
  "reference_usage": {
    "image_1": "preserve the compact square crop and subject-to-equipment relationship",
    "image_2": "optional equipment realism reference"
  },
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "70mm commercial subject photography",
    "aperture": "f/3.2",
    "light_source": "controlled industrial ambient light",
    "time_of_day": "neutral interior or shaded worksite light",
    "motion_rule": "subject is nearly still, focused on work"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "single subject fills the square crop cleanly",
    "control surface or equipment remains clearly visible",
    "background stays soft and secondary",
    "image remains readable at small square size"
  ],
  "visual_standard": "premium commercial engineering subject photography",
  "color_restriction": "restrained industrial blues, greys, metal tones, and subtle safety accents only",
  "material_notes": [
    "real PPE and workwear textures",
    "believable control hardware",
    "clean industrial surfaces",
    "no plastic skin or fabric sheen"
  ],
  "scene": "A real engineer or technician interacting with industrial control equipment in a disciplined operational setting",
  "subject": "One subject is the hero, supported by real industrial context",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "credible engineer interaction",
    "real equipment context",
    "single subject emphasis",
    "commercially usable square crop"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "1:1",
    "hero_safe_area": "not required",
    "focal_structure": "one dominant subject with one supporting equipment layer",
    "camera": "commercial subject-led industrial photography",
    "cropping": "designed for a small square website image"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "style": "premium commercial engineering photography",
    "mood": "steady, reliable, execution-focused",
    "contrast": "controlled and realistic",
    "surface_behavior": "real material response, no artificial glow"
  },
  "commercial_constraints": [
    "must feel suitable for a refined B2B website",
    "must be photorealistic",
    "must avoid generic stock posing",
    "must not contain text or UI",
    "must stay clear and credible in a compact square frame"
  ],
  "avoid": [
    "crowded team photos",
    "dramatic action pose",
    "headline text or symbols",
    "fake HUD overlays",
    "fashion-editorial posing",
    "obvious AI artifacts"
  ]
}
candidates.notes: Pro baseline round 1 for homepage-wide compare, mission state v2 prompt

candidates.label: Mission Square / Join Us
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "homepage join-us tab square image",
  "business_context": "Rally Technology, a Taiwanese industrial automation and control integration company",
  "page_role": "Homepage Mission square image for the join-us state",
  "goal": "Create a photorealistic square image that communicates collaboration, technical capability, and approachable professionalism without drifting into recruiting-stock aesthetics",
  "visual_message": "A collaborative technical moment in a real engineering environment that feels aligned, modern, and grounded",
  "recipe_ids": [
    "technical-signal-stack",
    "named-visual-standard",
    "color-material-control",
    "spatial-director-language"
  ],
  "reference_usage": {
    "image_1": "preserve the human-centered square crop and approachable posture",
    "image_2": "optional engineering context or equipment realism reference"
  },
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "70mm commercial subject photography",
    "aperture": "f/3.2",
    "light_source": "soft controlled workshop or lab light",
    "time_of_day": "neutral indoor daylight",
    "motion_rule": "calm, conversational, lightly active"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "one primary human subject remains clear in the square crop",
    "technical environment supports the subject without crowding the frame",
    "collaboration signal is visible through posture or gaze, not exaggerated smiling",
    "background stays soft and commercially clean"
  ],
  "visual_standard": "premium commercial engineering collaboration photography",
  "color_restriction": "restrained neutrals, engineering whites, muted metal tones, and controlled warm skin tones only",
  "material_notes": [
    "real fabric textures",
    "believable lab or equipment materials",
    "clean skin texture",
    "no beauty-retouched plastic finish"
  ],
  "scene": "A real engineer or technical collaborator engaging with equipment or a teammate in a modern engineering workspace",
  "subject": "Human-led collaboration is the hero, but it must stay rooted in real technical context",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "credible technical collaboration",
    "real engineering or equipment environment",
    "human-led but still industrial",
    "commercially usable square crop"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "1:1",
    "hero_safe_area": "not required",
    "focal_structure": "one human subject with one supporting context layer",
    "camera": "commercial subject-led engineering photography",
    "cropping": "designed for a small square website image"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "style": "premium commercial collaboration photography",
    "mood": "approachable, capable, aligned",
    "contrast": "controlled and realistic",
    "surface_behavior": "real human and equipment textures"
  },
  "commercial_constraints": [
    "must feel suitable for a refined B2B website",
    "must be photorealistic",
    "must avoid generic recruiting brochure energy",
    "must not contain text or UI",
    "must stay clear and credible in a compact square frame"
  ],
  "avoid": [
    "salesy corporate smiling stock",
    "fashion portrait styling",
    "headline text or symbols",
    "fake futuristic interface overlays",
    "plastic skin",
    "obvious AI artifacts"
  ]
}
candidates.notes: Pro baseline round 1 for homepage-wide compare, join-us state v2 prompt
